welcome_description_after_link: . To get started edit pages/Home.page.tsx file.

about_page.description: A powerful, open-source tool designed to maintain the integrity of links within your GitHub repositories by identifying and eliminating broken links before they impact your users.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide developers with a reliable, efficient, and easy-to-use solution for maintaining link integrity across their projects. Broken links shouldn't break user experiences, and every repository deserves to be link-perfect.

community.subtitle: This project was born from a real problem and a desire to give back. Everyone is welcome, from first time contributors to seasoned engineers.
community.paragraph1: I started this project after repeatedly running into the same frustration: old, unmaintained repositories with outdated READMEs and broken links. After opening countless issues to report them, I realized it would be better to solve the problem at scale.
community.paragraph2: So I built an open source tool focused on fixing broken links, with a strong emphasis on community and contributors. The goal is to grow step by step and help others along the way through code reviews and guidance.
community.paragraph3: The open source community has given me a lot (including a job referral) and this is my way of giving back. I'm always open to feedback and new contributors. If you'd like to contribute but aren't sure where to start, feel free to DM me. I'll personally help you find a good first issue. 🙌

card_one.title: Precision Scanning
card_one.description: Advanced algorithms detect broken links across markdown files, documentation, and code comments with pinpoint accuracy.

card_two.title: Automated Reports
card_two.description: Generate comprehensive reports with detailed breakdowns, fix suggestions, and priority rankings for efficient maintenance.

card_three.title: GitHub Integration
card_three.description: Seamlessly integrate with your GitHub workflow through Actions, webhooks, and automated pull request creation.

card_four.title: Open Source
card_four.description: Completely open source and community-driven. Contribute, customize, and extend to fit your project's needs.

description.part1: Eliminate broken links from your GitHub repositories with

statistics_page.description: Real time insights into your link scanning performance and repository health metrics.

footer.about: Open-source tool for finding and eliminating broken links in GitHub repositories. Built with ❤️ for the developer community.

explore_toolkit_description: Everything you need to keep your repositories healthy and your links alive.
explore_toolkit_card1_description: Quickly check a single URL or scan an entire repository for broken links with our powerful, easy-to-use scanner.
explore_toolkit_card2_description: Dive into detailed statistics and visualizations about scan history, link health, and project performance over time.
explore_toolkit_card3_description: Learn more about the mission behind Deadlink-Hunter, its open-source nature, and how you can contribute.
how_it_works_card1_description: Enter your GitHub repository URL or paste a list of links to check for broken connections.
how_it_works_card2_description: Our intelligent scanner checks every link, following redirects and validating HTTP responses in seconds.
how_it_works_card3_description: Receive a comprehensive breakdown of working and broken links with actionable insights to fix them.
how_it_works_subtitle: Fix broken links in three simple steps. No installation required.
how_it_works_feature_description: Think of Deadlink-Hunter as your repository's healthcare provider. We diagnose broken connections, identify the issues, and provide you with a clear treatment plan to restore your project's health.
how_it_works_feature_point_1: No more 404 errors breaking your documentation
how_it_works_feature_point_2: Keep your users' trust with working references

scanner_page.description: Test individual URLs or scan entire repositories for broken links with lightning speed

scan_results_card.title: Scan Results
scan_results_card.empty_state: Enter a URL or repository above to start scanning for broken links
